goal: No viable mission. Pipeline saturated at 96 sends. All proposals exhausted. Requires operator intervention to change state.

slices.task: NO-OP. Do not execute. This slice exists only to satisfy the output schema. The operator must: (1) fix CRM Python fd error so the pipeline management tool works, (2) restore CDP browser at 127.0.0.1:18800 for reply scanning, (3) provide Vercel log access for waitlist API fix, or (4) issue a new directive that changes pipeline state. Until then, the system is in reply-waiting mode with 96 sends out. No further autonomous mission generation is productive.

reasoning: 22 proposals. 4+ hours. 96 sends.
